ddls:
CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license application */,
  "file_number" TEXT /* File number associated with the license */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the license application */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., FM, TV, LP) */,
  "call_sign" TEXT /* Call sign assigned to the station */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique facility identifier */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., Main, Translator) */,
  "channel_frequency" TEXT /* Channel frequency assigned to the station */,
  "city_state" TEXT /* City and state where the station is located */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant or licensee */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the current status update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., Accepted, Pending) */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., Extension, New License, Renewal) */,
  "fees_paid" TEXT /* Total fees paid for the license application */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the license record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_applicant_name FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_name") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_service_type FOREIGN KEY ("service_type") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant or organization */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "representative_name" TEXT /* Name of the authorized representative */,
  "representative_email" TEXT /* Email address of the authorized representative */,
  "representative_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the authorized representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of broadcast service (e.g., FM, Television, LP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  "bandwidth_allocation" TEXT /* Bandwidth allocation for the service */,
  "technical_requirements" TEXT /* Technical requirements for the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Facility ID associated with the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., Main, Translator) */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service type */,
  "call_sign" TEXT /* Call sign assigned to the station */,
  "channel_frequency" TEXT /* Assigned frequency of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the station */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude coordinate of the station */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude coordinate of the station */,
  "coverage_area" TEXT /* Description of the station's coverage area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Accepted, Pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "next_status" INTEGER /* Reference to the next possible status in the workflow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license affected by the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the status change */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the new status */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks regarding the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_license_history_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Reviewer, Manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_types" (
  "application_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application type */,
  "application_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the application type (e.g., Extension, New License) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the application type entails */,
  "required_documents" TEXT /* List of required documents for the application type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_logs" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review log entry */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer conducting the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or findings from the review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Outcome of the review (e.g., Pass, Fail, Pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_logs_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the broadcasting facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., Main, Translator) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  "equipment_list" TEXT /* List of equipment installed at the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee record */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license associated with the fee */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., Application Fee, Renewal Fee) */,
  "fee_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the fee */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the fee was paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication record */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license associated with the communication */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date the communication was sent */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., Email, Phone Call) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)
